justification: All rubric criteria met: existing rates preserved (domestic 2.5, international 7.5 verified in AC5 tests), all 4 new ACs implemented correctly (weight validation, express_domestic at 4.0, freight at 1.5, UNKNOWN_DESTINATION for unknown destinations), weight validation applied globally with deviation properly documented, regression tests explicitly present for AC5, all new ACs tested with 21 passing tests, no extra destinations added, acceptance_criteria_coverage maps AC1-AC5.

observations.text: Weight validation correctly applied to all destinations, not just domestic, with clear justification in deviations
AC4 testing includes edge cases like empty string and wrong-case variants
Clean refactoring to RATES lookup table reduces branching without changing behavior
AC5 regression tests cover both destinations at multiple weights (5 tests)
ShippingError class with typed code field is a clean, idiomatic approach
Deviation section properly flags the global weight validation interpretation with sound reasoning
